description: The host page's own bridge listener MUST discard a message whose event.origin does not exactly equal the mount's isolation_origin, before parsing its data as a bridge message at all -- the parent-verifies-iframe-origin half of the postMessage origin check. The attacker origin here is deliberately prefix-confusable (the real isolation_origin as an exact leading substring, with an attacker-controlled registrable domain appended as a fake subdomain) to prove the check is exact string equality, never a prefix, suffix, or other partial/substring match a naive comparison could satisfy.
